channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) rises 2.1%
item.description: NEAR Protocol (NEAR), up 2.8%, was also a top performer.

item.title: Pump.fun accounts for over one-third of Solana’s Q1 revenue despite memecoin slowdown
item.description: Pump.fun pulled in $124.7 million in Q1 2026, making it Solana’s largest revenue generator even as memecoin activity cooled, while the network’s RWA market cap crossed $2 billion.

item.title: Amid the Clarity Act fanfare is some worry over how a last-minute deal may punch DeFi
item.description: The crypto market structure bill saw a high-stakes, 11th-hour gambit to get Democrats on board for a bipartisan committee vote, but it might carry a cost.

item.title: Bitget Wallet integrates Kraken-backed xStocks tokenized equities
item.description: The self-custodial wallet platform integrated Kraken-backed xStocks infrastructure, adding more than 130 tokenized stocks and ETFs for users.

item.title: Bits to Bricks: Tokenization and US Financial Power
item.description: Thomas Cowan from Galaxy explores tokenization and US financial power on this episode of Bits to Bricks.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Shed $649M in a Day as Long-Term BTC Holders ‘Limit Downside Potential’
item.description: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs posted $648 million outflows Monday as long-term BTC holders continue to accumulate the cryptocurrency.

item.title: #Bitcoin doesn't look great. Far from it. Five consecutive days of red candles, liquidations on the long side, Michael Saylor buying another $2 billion in assets, and there's no momentum at all taking place. There's still an outstanding CME gap at $79,100 waiting - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9qOW5tbURuUzFvUkEyUzVuWGpyUEdPQ0ZTMU0zU3VQWHF6WG92R2VCTC1RSFRoY0RkODNTS0laWHJ0LXBNWnV5d05OdElCc09EQVE4b0JmSzlWblpSaktaMXVSMA?oc=5" target="_blank">#Bitcoin doesn't look great. Far…

item.title: Morning Minute: SEC Reverses Course on Tokenized Stocks, HYPE Soars
item.description: HYPE soared as the SEC opened the door to third-party tokenized stocks. Strategy bought another $2B in BTC, and price still went lower.

item.title: Bitcoin may bottom in October if historical reward-halving cycle holds
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 19, 2026

item.title: Bitcoin DeFi Platform Echo Protocol Hit By $76M Monad Exploit
item.description: Echo Protocol said that a compromised admin key had enabled unauthorized eBTC minting on its Monad deployment.

item.title: Wallet cluster earned $2.4M with 98% win rate on Polymarket military bets: Bubblemaps
item.description: Bubblemaps’ investigation found a cluster of nine accounts that generated $2.4 million with a near-perfect win rate on Polymarket contracts tied to major US military operations.

item.title: BSC’s quantum defense works. The trade-off is 40% slower transaction throughput.
item.description: BSC’s quantum-security test worked, but bigger transaction data slowed network throughput by about 40%.

item.title: Bitcoin treads water near pivotal monthly close while speculative tokens retreat
item.description: Bitcoin held near $76,800 as altcoins weakened, WLFI slid and traders watched whether the largest cryptocurrency can hold Tom Lee's line in the sand.

item.title: Ohio Man Gets 9 Years for $10M Bitcoin Trading Ponzi Scheme
item.description: Rathnakishore Giri falsely promised guaranteed returns on Bitcoin derivatives trading, using new investor funds to pay earlier participants.

item.title: Swan Bitcoin sued for nearly $1B over pre-bankruptcy transfers from Prime Trust
item.description: Swan Bitcoin has been sued for allegedly using insider access to pull nearly $1 billion in Bitcoin and cash from Prime Trust days before its 2023 bankruptcy filing.

item.title: Echo Protocol suffers $76 million exploit in eBTC minting attack on Monad
item.description: The Bitcoin-focused DeFi protocol suffered an attack whereby about 1,000 unauthorized eBTC $77 million were minted on the Monad blockchain

item.title: A DeFi exchange becomes the first to offer equity perpetuals powered by Nasdaq data
item.description: The partnership underscores both the rapid growth of equity perpetuals in onchain markets and Nasdaq’s broader strategy to support tokenized equity trading infrastructure.

item.title: XRP and Solana funds attract inflows as bitcoin outflows hit nearly $1 billion
item.description: CoinShares data shows investors are rotating into listed products based on XRP and SOL while bitcoin and ethereum products posted heavy weekly outflows.

item.title: Republican lawmakers call for permanent CBDC ban as House vote approaches
item.description: Tom Emmer, the House majority whip, is also advocating for his Anti-CBDC Surveillance State Act, which has passed the House but has yet to pass the Senate.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation sees 2 more high-profile departures
item.description: Ethereum Foundation researchers Julian Ma and Carl Beek have resigned, bringing the total number of major departures from the nonprofit to at least eight in 2026.

item.title: Crypto stocks. We may be headed full-on to a Snow Crash cyber-punk future with no long-term personal relationships and digital value embedded in all of us directly correlated to the value provided to a society that increasingly devalues humanity. This may be - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBzNlVKTkhjOGZxa2Q5SEE1ZGdhVlhsVjZlbHhVQVE2ZzRYSGRCS0JQcmEybVpYQlhYcVdITUhJMXdSU1lNYjhPb1dDUXB4Z1M2U2RqTHgxbURFY0lGX19fWDlrWmY?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto stocks. We may be headed…

item.title: Bitcoin has shed $5,000 within days. ETF flows, derivatives say the selloff could worsen
item.description: Bitcoin has fallen about 6% from $82,000 to $76,800, and underlying data point to the drop being more than a routine pullback.

item.title: World Liberty Financial treasury company AI Financial warns that it may not survive the year in SEC filing
item.description: The former Alt5 Sigma marked its 7.28 billion WLFI tokens at $706 million, down from a roughly $1.46 billion cost basis, while disclosing that the holdings remain locked amid liquidity concerns.

item.title: About 10% of Americans used crypto in 2025, highest level since 2022: Fed
item.description: Among those who used crypto for payments, over 25% said they did so because the business preferred crypto, citing speed, privacy and lower cost advantages.

item.title: Echo Protocol's eBTC exploited for $77M in admin key compromise
item.description: The hacker has already laundered nearly 5% of the loot through Tornado Cash and is still holding the remaining 955 eBTC.

item.title: Ether pullback was ‘attractive opportunity’ for 71,672 ETH buy: Bitmine’s Lee
item.description: Bitmine chairman Tom Lee said the company is expected to have accumulated 5% of Ether's total supply before the end of the year.

item.title: Copy-Paste 'Quitting Crypto' Posts Flood X Amid Market Dip - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTE1WSjc1Z1lNbHpCVTlaUTRzYnkycGs4cW15aV9FdWowT25zb2FFM2NyOVRKRF9SZ01sRWR5aWVuWXNUS1FwYVNYRkRtT2pKQzFXLTJRVkFoNA?oc=5" target="_blank">Copy-Paste 'Quitting Crypto' Posts Flood X Amid …

item.title: SEC to make ‘innovation exemption’ for tokenized stock trading: Report
item.description: Several SEC officials reportedly didn’t support the decision, while tokenization platform Securitize flagged risks with enabling third-party platforms to issue tokenized stocks.

item.title: Retail Bitcoin investor demand falls by 73% as futures selling tops $2B: Are the bears back?
item.description: Bitcoin retail inflows to Binance remained at record lows as aggressive BTC futures selling and weakening spot demand pressured BTC below $77,000.

item.title: Odds against rate cuts high as new US Fed chair set for swearing in
item.description: Many experts voiced concerns that the confirmation of Kevin Warsh as Federal Reserve chair would lead to uncertainty about the central bank’s independence, particularly in setting interest rates.

item.title: Galaxy secures New York BitLicense to expand institutional crypto services
item.description: The NYDFS approvals allow GalaxyOne Prime NY to offer trading and financing services to institutional investors in one of the most tightly regulated US crypto markets.

item.title: SEC to propose tokenized stock framework as Wall Street efforts deepen: Bloomberg
item.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission is reportedly poised to release a major crypto proposal as it seeks to institute its digital assets agenda.

item.title: JUST IN: 100,000 blocks remain until the next Bitcoin Halving. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBkWWZ6VGFraHVFQTZrekFMSkQ0cUZabnNDUHVCTDdnaXBTRFI4NzYxRDM5NGczMmdvOWdsRTY0eTNJUDNUQ25EU1dGOVNWdW56bF9faWE5VXhjMTg0amdXUmZ3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 100,000 blocks remain unt…

item.title: Bitcoin lost its hold on $80K, but three events may send it back sooner than markets expect
item.description: Bitcoin positions itself for a rally above $80,000 after Strategy's $2 billion BTC buy, crumbling investor confidence in the US Treasury and a potential US-Iran deal.

item.title: Lawyers Apologize After Fake Claude-Generated Quotes Appear in Trump Layoffs Case
item.description: Attorneys representing a former Homeland Security official admitted using Anthropic’s Claude Console to help draft a court filing that included fabricated quotes.

item.title: Soluna revenue jumps 58% as hosting business offsets weaker Bitcoin mining
item.description: Hosting revenue outpaced mining as new capacity came online, highlighting Soluna’s shift toward data centers for AI and high-performance computing.

item.title: Georgia primary to test crypto PAC’s support for Democratic candidate
item.description: A political action committee aligned with crypto interest groups reported spending more than $4 million in support of Democratic US House candidate Jasmine Clark in Georgia.

item.title: JUST IN: SEC prepares to legalize blockchain-based, tokenized stock trading. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBNTWFFbi1LbUZQR05ac0NvVEg3M09SQXFaNTkwcTZ6N1A1TU5neEcxV2tBNVBTWjQ4ZHBhbFdrdmhYeE9PTnZEdF9BaWVyTGF1M3Q0dm9xaHc2M3ZMdmNQSA?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: SEC prepares to legalize bl…

item.title: Minnesotan banks and credit unions set to provide crypto custody Aug. 1
item.description: Minnesota established the midwest’s first unified digital asset safety net for banks and credit unions.

item.title: AI Still Can't Beat the On-Call Engineer: Here's Why
item.description: The best AI models can't yet beat the engineers they’re supposed to replace at fixing real-world problems, a new benchmark suggests.

item.title: The two largest corporate holders of Bitcoin: Strategy - 843,738 BTC BlackRock - 817,138 BTC Who will win the race to 1,000,000 BTC? - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5WWTJUNjN3M3p5MTBuSGZHS2t6YWZUU29lUi1jb05ycTk1QTQ3V0hKcVNtdk9zZU10Y3d4eXFWQU02ekE5SXU3RW1pU1RhSngxS0NQYlYtZ2dScWNqdkRLZlNNQmtwb1U?oc=5" target="_blank">The two largest corporate h…

item.title: Bitcoin Faces Greater Quantum Computing Risk Than Ethereum, Citi Warns
item.description: Both Bitcoin and Ethereum face a quantum computing threat, but Citi says the gap between them comes down to governance, not just technology.

item.title: Hyperliquid's USDC deal could supercharge HYPE, pressure Circle, Coinbase margins, analysts say
item.description: The revenue share deal could shift an estimated $160 million in revenue from Coinbase and Circle into Hyperliquid's ecosystem, Compass Point analysts said.

item.title: Bitcoin’s trend-defining battle starts at $74K support: Analyst
item.description: Bitcoin traders are closely watching the $74,000-$75,000 support zone as exchange inflows rise and market signals weaken following BTC's loss of momentum above $82,000.

item.title: Swan Bitcoin Hit With Nearly $1 Billion Lawsuit Over Prime Trust Collapse
item.description: The lawsuit alleges that the Bitcoin-centric financial services firm took advantage of insider information to escape major losses.

item.title: JUST IN: Pro-Bitcoin Kevin Warsh to be sworn in as Federal Reserve Chair this Friday 👀🇺🇸 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBoOE92T1NQbUwtczJrTFpsLXhsbDlYdkxMRGVLMkJ3TV94cTFRbjdKazJzNEROQzhvMnZUeTBPbXNNZV9UclRQeG96RDdEQ1UzQm5OUXlIYVRjM0ExdDZubmJoMU5nX0k?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Pro-Bitcoin Kevin …

item.title: This Open-Source Phone AI Agent Sees, Hears and Acts—All Without Touching the Cloud
item.description: Oppo's X-OmniClaw runs directly on your Android device, using the camera, screen, and microphone to execute real tasks inside real apps.

item.title: Polymarket Users Spur Insider Trading Suspicions With $2.4 Million in Iran Prediction Wins
item.description: Interlinked Polymarket accounts have made millions betting on U.S. military actions in Iran—and won 98% of the time, analysts say.

item.title: Revolut wants to take Dogecoin mainstream with its new physical payment card
item.description: The European fintech giant is launching a physical debit card that lets users spend the popular meme coin anywhere Visa and Mastercard are accepted with zero extra exchange fees.

item.title: This is exactly what EVERYONE said about crypto. Any regulation is bad. I got crucified on here for saying that the industry needed regulation to expand it to normies. Now EVERY major player is giving money via Crypto PACs, trying to get MORE legislation fin - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFA4UkhnaGxma3JLVXVRYmJlWVkwaVNnTmFQVDl6NmZOUFRXN3k5ampZNnk3UGtXQkw5c0dWOF9nUUFUTHBCYVBya3REelNOV2N3NS1vWmlUZG9RYjA?oc=5" target="_blank">This is exactly what EVERYONE said about cr…

item.title: Price predictions 5/18: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA
item.description: Bitcoin dropped to the crucial $76,000 support level while large-cap altcoins sold off sharply. Do technical charts suggest that traders will buy the dip?

item.title: Minnesota legalizes crypto custody services for banks, credit unions
item.description: Minnesota-based banking institutions and credit unions will be authorized to provide digital asset custody services in a nonfiduciary capacity as of Aug. 1.

item.title: Elon Musk Loses $150 Billion AI Lawsuit Against OpenAI and Sam Altman
item.description: The legal battle between Elon Musk and OpenAI has ended in a win for the company he co-founded, following a jury decision.

item.title: Solana is shedding its memecoin reputation as big banks move billions into its ecosystem
item.description: Wall Street and payment giants are quietly taking over Solana, moving billions onto the network for tokenized funds and global payments even as the broader crypto market cools down, according to a new report by Messari.

item.title: Ethereum Founder Vitalik Buterin Says AI Verification Could Help Secure Crypto Networks
item.description: Vitalik Buterin said mathematically verified software may help protect cryptographic infrastructures as AI improves both code generation and vulnerability discovery.

item.title: The Ethereum Foundation is facing a wave of high-profile departures as its internal shakeup deepens
item.description: The turnover comes as the foundation undergoes an internal transition tied to a new organizational mandate aimed at redefining its role within Ethereum.

item.title: OFFICIAL: Michael Saylor's Strategy now owns over 4% of Bitcoin's entire supply. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1FaXZfNGpvblk4ZG56ekFXc1N0M2RMaHpZLWhkUy1yVDV3a0V2Wm1Gd0tBQVlLZGw3WER3LUNBd2VmRGRoOVJHeU1fc2ZBelVLaVZwSGY1bFllLTRhQXV2TnZLS3VfcTA?oc=5" target="_blank">OFFICIAL: Michael Saylor's …

item.title: Mike Novogratz’s Galaxy receives New York BitLicense for institutional crypto push
item.description: Galaxy Digital became the second company this year to secure a New York BitLicense, following Strike’s approval in March.

item.title: Crypto funds see $1B in outflows as Iran tensions revive risk-off sentiment
item.description: Institutional investors pulled capital from Bitcoin and Ether products as Iran tension and rising inflation rattled markets, while XRP and Solana funds continued to attract fresh inflows.

item.title: Hive Shares Hit Highest Price This Year After Bitcoin Miner Unveils Ontario 'AI Gigafactory'
item.description: Hive Digital Technologies’ stock price popped after the Bitcoin miner unveiled a massive data-center buildout in Ontario, Canada.
